name: Igneous Kal-Mej
hoverSummary: Tier 85 magic cape with 37.1 magic damage bonus.
detailLines: High-level magic cape created by upgrading TokHaar-Kal-Mej with an igneous stone.
Magic cape upgrade behavior is reserved for the dedicated ultimate/passive pass.
implementationNotes: Curated magic cape from the live Igneous Kal-Mej page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for tier and style bonus.
